note: Sprint 5.20: Trinity Scientific Prompt Intake v0.1. New scripts/trinity/scientific_prompt_intake.py is Trinity's local-only science inbox: read a prompt (--prompt or --prompt-file) plus any number of reference --document files (.txt / .md / .json), sha256-hash everything and write a deterministic audit artifact TRINITY_SCIENTIFIC_PROMPT_INTAKE_<id>.json. Documents are recorded by basename + sha256 + size + a bounded text preview (default 256 chars); absolute paths and full content are deliberately NOT stored. Schema trinity-scientific-prompt-intake/v0.1 locks 7 const-true safety flags: local_only, no_network, no_llm_call, no_wallet_access, no_broadcast, no_private_keys, deterministic_output. Default limits (overridable): 32 KiB prompt, 1 MiB per doc, 16 docs, .txt .md .json. Pre-argparse rejection of --broadcast / --send / --payout-now / --auto-pay / --sign-now / --export-private-key / --wallet / --llm-call / --http-call / --upload with rc=2. Determinism: same prompt + docs + --pinned-time produce byte-identical artefacts; documents are sorted by sha256 internally so CLI order does not matter. Tests: 11 static-safety (no subprocess / socket / requests / urllib / httpx / websockets / sost-cli / wallet tokens / private_key / sendrawtransaction / eval / exec / openai / anthropic / completion), 8 schema, 26 functional (happy paths, redaction, preview bounds, rejection of bad extension / oversize / too-many / missing / mutually-exclusive prompt+prompt-file, pre-argparse flag matrix, schema validation, deterministic intake_id, doc order independence). Web (trinity-useful-compute.html) adds a Scientific Prompt Intake v0.1 card. No src/, no consensus, no RPC, no wallet, no signer, no wire-format change.
